title: osteospermum calcicola
intro: Osteospermum calcicola, also known as the calcicole osteospermum or African daisy, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is a succulent perennial with medicinal properties, primarily used to treat various ailments, including wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant's leaves and flowers are rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, contributing to its health benefits such as wound healing, reduced inflammation, and improved immune function. The herbal preparations of osteospermum calcicola include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
